name: spectral-curiosity
description: Antigravity Workspace Manager — Fix and manage conversation workspace associations

scripts.dev: bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/client/index.css -o dist/app.css && bun run src/server/index.ts
scripts.build:ext: cd src/extension && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -v 39.2.3 -m . && node esbuild.mjs
scripts.package:ext: bun run build:ext && cd src/extension && npx @vscode/vsce package
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
